title: Long Term Archive
description: System for long-term storage of data, separated from primary media for compliance or archival purposes, organized as files or cataloged structures.

definitions.definition: System for long-term storage of data, separated from primary media for compliance or archival purposes, organized as files or cataloged structures.
definitions.notes: A facility that provides permanent active archive functions for archived holdings during and beyond the scope of the mission or project, receiving responsibility for these holdings and providing long-term access to users. - EOSDIS
definitions.sources: - NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
